description_long: This rifle features a classic design with a dark wooden fixed stock and a robust metal receiver and barrel assembly. The weapon has a prominent pistol grip and a detachable box magazine inserted in front of the trigger guard. The barrel is long and straight, ending with a simple muzzle, and the rifle is equipped with basic iron sights for aiming. The wood components, including the stock and foregrip, have a polished, dark brown finish, contrasting with the matte black metal parts. The overall construction suggests durability and functionality, typical of mid-20th-century submachine guns. The rifle's proportions and details indicate it is designed for both stability and ease of handling in urban environments.
description: A classic rifle with a dark wooden fixed stock, black metal receiver, and detachable box magazine, featuring iron sights and a long barrel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow profile of the barrel, iron sights, and the top of the magazine.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the wooden stock, pistol grip, magazine, and barrel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the stock and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite side of the stock, receiver, and magazine, with clear detail of the trigger and grip.
